message.content:
Hello! 👋 I'm your Orchestrator for this Way of Pi session. I'm ready to help you work across the workspace, coordinate tasks, read/write files, and orchestrate other agent personas via `.pi/agents/teams.yaml`.

What would you like to work on today? Whether it's:
- Finding/generating code or docs
- Managing team rosters
- Setting up the project structure
- Or anything else

Just let me know!

Glad to hear it! 😊

Ready when you are — just drop in what you'd like to work on and I'll help coordinate it in the Way of Pi workspace.
